name: Button
description: A versatile button component with multiple variants, loading states, gradient support, and customizable styling. Supports icons and animated text.

children.description: Button content (text, icons, or other elements)

loading.description: Shows a loader and disables the button when true

background.description: Background color or CSS gradient string

color.description: Text color or CSS gradient string

showIcon.description: Whether to show an icon on the right side of the button

icon.description: Custom icon element (uses default RightRoundedIcon if not provided)

isLeaving.description: Animation state for text transition effects

textAnimatedDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds for text animation

disabled.description: Native button disabled state (inherited from ButtonHTMLAttributes)

advanced.title: Button with loading state
advanced.description: Button showing a loader when processing

advanced.title: Outline variant button
advanced.description: Button with outline style and gradient colors

advanced.title: Button with icon
advanced.description: Button with a custom icon on the right

advanced.title: Link style button
advanced.description: Button styled as a text link

aria: aria-label - Add descriptive label for icon-only buttons
aria-disabled - Automatically handled via disabled prop
accessibility.notes: The button is disabled automatically when loading prop is true. All native button HTML attributes are supported.

notes: Extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>, so all native button props are available
The loading state automatically disables the button
Gradients are supported for both background and color props
When showIcon is true without a custom icon, RightRoundedIcon is used by default
Text color is extracted and split for the loader animation
